description_long: This apartment building features a rectangular, boxy structure with a flat roof and a smaller rooftop utility enclosure. The exterior is finished in a reddish-brown, weathered texture, giving it a slightly aged, utilitarian appearance. The front facade includes two square windows on the upper floor and a large garage door with a single entry door on the ground level. The rooftop enclosure has a set of double doors and a small window, while the side of the building displays a set of vertical utility pipes. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the building is adorned with a simple cornice detail just below the roofline. The overall design is functional and minimal, typical of mid-20th-century urban apartment blocks.
description: A boxy, reddish-brown apartment building with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a rooftop utility enclosure. The facade features a garage door, entry door, and simple architectural details.
description_view_0: Front view showing two upper windows, a garage door, and an entry door, with the rooftop enclosure and its double doors visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain wall, rooftop enclosure, and a set of vertical utility pipes running down the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly featureless wall with a single small window on the rooftop enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain wall and the rooftop enclosure, with no visible windows or doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with two evenly spaced square windows on the upper floor and a single small window on the rooftop enclosure.
